# Vitalis Health Strategies

> Physician-led healthcare consulting firm based in Calgary,
> Alberta. We serve medical, dental, and veterinary practices
> across Canada with clinic builds, operational optimization,
> revenue cycle improvement, physician recruitment,
> accreditation support, and mergers and acquisitions.

## Pages
